# AI-hint: GENERATED Quadlet pod for the co-resident group 'mios-remote-desktop' (WS-7 pods-as-SSOT). DO NOT EDIT -- regenerate via tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py from [pods.mios-remote-desktop] in mios.toml. Members (3): mios-guacamole, mios-guacd, mios-guacamole-postgres.
# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-guacamole.container, mios-guacd.container, mios-guacamole-postgres.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-remote-desktop.pod
# Remote desktop platform.
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-remote-desktop.pod):
#   mios-guacamole
#   mios-guacd
#   mios-guacamole-postgres
[Unit]
Description='MiOS' remote desktop pod
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target

[Pod]
PodName=mios-remote-desktop
Network=host

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
